Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Dismissal

Satori Movement, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Recover Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Satori Movement, Inc.'s Motion To Recover Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred To Enforce Settlement Agreement is Granted in the total amount of $5,269.98. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF SATORI MOVEMENT, INC.'S Motion To Recover Attorneys Fees And Costs Incurred To Enforce Settlement Agreement is continued to September 1, 2015 to give the opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 17, 2015, at 4:00 pm.
